name: Cardinal Infrastructure Group Inc.
business: Cardinal Infrastructure Group Inc. provides site preparation and infrastructure construction services, including underground utilities, grading, concrete, and asphalt paving, primarily to private residential homebuilders and public sector agencies such as state and federal departments of transportation.

exposures.sentence: We start with core site preparation services, such as underground capabilities like drilling and blasting, wet utility work (wastewater, fresh water and storm drainage), electrical utility conduit lines and grading.
Our private sector customers are non government entities, consisting primarily of residential homebuilders.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of A.L. Grading Contractors (ALGC) to expand into Georgia market
catalysts.sentence: On February 18, 2026, we acquired Sugar Hill, Georgia-based A.L. Grading Contractors ( ALGC ).

catalysts.event: Expected recognition of $489-$541 million of backlog within 12 months
catalysts.sentence: We expect to recognize between $489 million and $541 million of our backlog within the twelve months following December 31, 2025.
